title: Document the Windows-first startup and validation path
outputs: A Windows-first runbook explains prereq check, startup, bridge connection, phone connection, smoke test, and failure triage
README and QUICKSTART point users to the runbook
The runbook states the current relay boundary clearly
do_not_do: Do not claim public relay is deployed
Do not add app-store, payment, DNS, or cloud account steps as completed work
Do not modify product code in this docs-only task
Do not stage unrelated untracked files
